taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Microsoft Office, Excel, Word, Database, MS SQL
skill_match_scores: Microsoft Office:1.0, Excel:1.0, Word:0.5, Database:1.0, MS SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Minimum 2-year Programming or Data related college degree, professional certification or equivalent related work experience, Microsoft Office (Excel, Word), Accuracy, Adaptability, Attention to Detail, Dependability, Initiative, Interpersonal, Logical Thinking, Oral Communication
preferred_quals: Database (MS SQL, MySQL and/or Access), Programming language(s) (i.e., C#, VB.net, VBA, etc.), VBA Script (MS Access)
core_responsibilities: Perform assigned duties with appropriate supervision and guidance, Follow established procedures to run programs and processes used to build, maintain, and verify products, Execute existing procedures, programs, and processes to build and validate products in accordance with customer requirements, With guidance, modify existing procedures, programs, and processes to create or update customer data, Perform all aspects of data verification, including regression testing, to ensure data accuracy and integrity, Collaborate with customers to gather, clarify, and document project requirements, Develop and maintain productive working relationships with customers to support data continuity and accuracy, Stay current with the software tools and systems used to build and maintain SMC³ products and data content, Identify potential alternatives or improvements and present recommendations to the direct manager/supervisor and the Data Services team, Perform other related duties as assigned
job_summary: SMC³ is a company that focuses on data solutions, and they are seeking a Data Analyst to evaluate and manipulate data for their products. The role involves performing data verification, collaborating with customers, and maintaining data accuracy while following established procedures and guidelines.
